gov.nist.javax.sip.parser
クラス ParserFactory

java.lang.Object
  gov.nist.javax.sip.parser.ParserFactory

public class ParserFactory
extends java.lang.Object

A factory class that does a name lookup on a registered parser and returns a header parser for the given name.

バージョン:
JAIN-SIP-1.1 $Revision: 1.3 $ $Date: 2004/01/22 13:26:31 $
作成者:
M. Ranganathan
This code is in the public domain.

static HeaderParser createParser(java.lang.String line)
          create a parser for a header.

メソッドの詳細

createParser

public static HeaderParser createParser(java.lang.String line)
                                 throws java.text.ParseException
create a parser for a header. This is the parser factory.

例外:
java.text.ParseException
